Title: Successful Login
Preconditions: User has a valid Google account.
Test Steps:
1. Enter valid email and password.
2. Click on the login button.
Expected Result: User is redirected to FamilyActivity.

Title: Invalid Login
Preconditions: User has a valid Google account.
Test Steps:
1. Enter invalid email or password.
2. Click on the login button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating incorrect credentials.

Title: Empty Fields
Preconditions: User has a valid Google account.
Test Data: Empty fields for email and password.
Test Steps:
1. Leave email and password fields empty.
2. Click on the login button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating required fields are missing.

Title: Navigate to Monitoring Section
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the Home screen.
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the menu at the bottom of the page.
2. Select "Monitoraggio" from the menu options.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the MonitorFragment.

Title: Navigate to Notes Section
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the Home screen.
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the menu at the bottom of the page.
2. Select "Note" from the menu options.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the NoteFragment.

Title: Return to Home Screen
Preconditions: User is on the Notes or Monitoring section.
Test Steps: 1. Tap on the back button or select "Home" from the menu options.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the HomeFragment.

Title: Start Allattamento Collection
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the AllattamentoFragment.
Test Steps: 1. Tap on the "Avvia raccolta" button.
Expected Result: The collection process for allattamento starts, and the left and right counters begin to increment.

Title: Stop Allattamento Collection
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the AllattamentoFragment, collection is in progress.
Test Steps: 1. Tap on the "Stop" button.
Expected Result: The collection process for allattamento stops, and the left and right counters stop incrementing.

Title: Reset Allattamento Counters
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the AllattamentoFragment, collection is stopped.
Test Steps: 1. Tap on the "Reset" button.
Expected Result: The left and right counters are reset to zero.

Title: View Sonno Graph
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the ProfileActivity.
Test Steps: 1. Tap on the "Sonno" graph option.
Expected Result: The GraphSonnoFragment is displayed showing the sonno data.

Title: View Allattamento Graph
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the ProfileActivity.
Test Steps: 1. Tap on the "Allattamento" graph option.
Expected Result: The GraphAllattamentoFragment is displayed showing the allattamento data.

Title: View Crescita Graph
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the ProfileActivity.
Test Steps: 1. Tap on the "Crescita" graph option.
Expected Result: The GraphCrescitaFragment is displayed showing the crescita data.

Title: Abandon Family
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the ProfileActivity.
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the "Abbandona" button.
2. Confirm the action.
Expected Result: The user is logged out, and the application returns to the LoginActivity.

Title: Create New Family
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the CreaFamilyActivity.
Test Data: Valid family details (name, surname, gender, date).
Test Steps:
1. Enter valid family details.
2. Click on the "Create" button.
Expected Result: The family is created, and the user is redirected to the FamilyActivity.

Title: Create Family with Invalid Date
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the CreaFamilyActivity.
Test Steps:
1. Enter an invalid date format.
2. Click on the "Create" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating the date format is incorrect.

Title: Create Family with Missing Details
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the CreaFamilyActivity.
Test Data: Missing one or more required fields.
Test Steps:
1. Leave one or more required fields empty.
2. Click on the "Create" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating required fields are missing.

Title: Join Existing Family
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the JoinFamilyActivity.
Test Steps:
1. Enter a valid family code.
2. Click on the "Join" button.
Expected Result: The user is added to the family, and the application redirects to the FamilyActivity.

Title: Join Family with Invalid Code
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the JoinFamilyActivity.
Test Steps:
1. Enter an invalid family code.
2. Click on the "Join" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating the family code is incorrect.

Title: Join Family with Missing Code
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the JoinFamilyActivity.
Test Steps:
1. Leave the family code field empty.
2. Click on the "Join" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating the family code is missing.

Title: Add Document to Allattamento
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the AllattamentoFragment.
Test Steps:
1. Enter valid document details.
2. Click on the "Aggiungi documento" button.
Expected Result: The document is added to the allattamento record.

Title: Add Field to Allattamento
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the AllattamentoFragment.
Test Steps:
1. Enter valid field details.
2. Click on the "Aggiungi campo" button.
Expected Result: The field is added to the allattamento record.

Title: Add Document with Invalid Details
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the AllattamentoFragment.
Test Steps:
1. Enter invalid document details.
2. Click on the "Aggiungi documento" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating the document details are invalid.

Title: Add Field with Invalid Details
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the AllattamentoFragment.
Test Steps:
1. Enter invalid field details.
2. Click on the "Aggiungi campo" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating the field details are invalid.

Title: Add Document with Missing Details
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the AllattamentoFragment.
Test Data: Missing one or more required fields for document.
Test Steps:
1. Leave one or more required fields for the document empty.
2. Click on the "Aggiungi documento" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating required fields are missing.

Title: Add Field with Missing Details
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the AllattamentoFragment.
Test Data: Missing one or more required fields for field.
Test Steps:
1. Leave one or more required fields for the field empty.
2. Click on the "Aggiungi campo" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating required fields are missing.

Title: Display Sonno Graph
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the GraphSonnoFragment.
Test Steps:
1. Ensure there is valid sonno data available.
2. Verify the graph displays correctly.
Expected Result: The graph displays the sonno data accurately.

Title: Display Allattamento Graph
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the GraphAllattamentoFragment.
Test Steps:
1. Ensure there is valid allattamento data available.
2. Verify the graph displays correctly.
Expected Result: The graph displays the allattamento data accurately.

Title: Display Crescita Graph
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the GraphCrescitaFragment.
Test Steps:
1. Ensure there is valid crescita data available.
2. Verify the graph displays correctly.
Expected Result: The graph displays the crescita data accurately.

Title: Display Empty Graph
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the GraphSonnoFragment.
Test Steps:
1. Ensure there is no sonno data available.
2. Verify the graph displays an empty state.
Expected Result: The graph displays an empty state indicating no data is available.

Title: Display Empty Graph
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the GraphAllattamentoFragment.
Test Steps:
1. Ensure there is no allattamento data available.
2. Verify the graph displays an empty state.
Expected Result: The graph displays an empty state indicating no data is available.

Title: Display Empty Graph
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the GraphCrescitaFragment.
Test Steps:
1. Ensure there is no crescita data available.
2. Verify the graph displays an empty state.
Expected Result: The graph displays an empty state indicating no data is available.
